name: Alarms and Timers
author: PermsTest
description: Alarms and Timers plugin surface for alarms, countdown timers, stopwatch, foreground notification state, and sounds.
comments: Bundled internal tool plugin. It requests a PermsTest host tool surface through the plugin API so the proven native controller keeps full behavior.

actions.title: Open Alarms / Timers
actions.description: Open the matching native PermsTest tool surface through the plugin host API.
